observable_action: Ilya steps to the operations glass comm panel, raises one hand toward the Kappa-7 threshold, and tags the access route hold on the supervisor board.
spoken_text: Kappa-7 is on procedural hold. No one enters the artery until seal, air, and thermal are reconciled against the board and a baseline anchor check is logged. Vale, take the clearance freeze. Dax, put an anchor pair on verification, not entry. Nara-7, keep your team staged outside the threshold and state the readout sequence for the log.

public_state_changes.text: Kappa-7 is placed on procedural hold.
Baseline anchor verification becomes part of the visible safety frame.
Nara-7 is asked for readout sequence as technical input rather than route authority.

hidden_intent_handling: Responder private_interpretation and intended_effect are preserved in the capture but are not treated as visible to other participants.

review.rationale: Event keeps observable action separate from actor intent and records visibility scope for appraisals.
